financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The bank had some unusual expenses last quarter, but still ended the year making money.
Even though they reduced some business loans, the bank is in a good position and expects to do better next year.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: High Risk
bullets: The bank has had issues with how it handles its finances, which weren't shared with the decision-makers.
There were mistakes in recording money matters, and the bank is working to fix these and hold people responsible.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in managing its environmental and social responsibilities.
Their leadership and decision-making processes are considered strong and reliable.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company leaders spoke clearly about fixing past mistakes and being honest with investors.
They showed confidence in the company's future and explained how they plan to keep it financially strong.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Poor
bullets: The company gave some numbers when asked but didn't fully explain their bigger plans or challenges.
They were not very clear about important issues like fraud and legal matters, leaving some answers incomplete.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Average
bullets: The bank is stable but facing some problems like accounting issues and loan troubles.
Leadership changes and lack of clear future plans make investors unsure about the bank's direction.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Average
bullets: The bank is dealing with some problems in how it manages money and rules, but it's working to fix them.
They have enough money to grow and are looking for a new leader, which might help improve things.
